intake.featureName: when attempting to add a Journey Note, after entering the note and clicking Add, the sc...
intake.summary:
when attempting to add a Journey Note, after entering the note and clicking Add, the screen will go white and a 404 Page Not Found error displays. See attachments.

 

I am able to replicate this in our demo environment and also tested adding a note to an activity and an event and experienced the same issue.

metadata.standardPrimary: Oracle VPAT guidance (internal Confluence source of truth)

policySource.name: Oracle A11y and VPAT minimums
policySource.notes: Derived from APO OAG 3.0 checklist subset; Oracle VPAT guidance is primary.

playbook.title: Add icon accessibility labels
playbook.whyItMatters: Unlabeled functional icons are silent for assistive technology users.
playbook.implementationHint: Add a11yLabel to functional Terra icons. Hide decorative icons with aria-hidden.

playbook.title: Restore keyboard parity for click handlers
playbook.whyItMatters: Mouse-only interactions block keyboard and switch-device users.
playbook.implementationHint: Use semantic button/link elements or add role, tabIndex, Enter/Space key handlers.

playbook.title: Attach explicit form labels
playbook.whyItMatters: Form fields without labels create ambiguity for screen readers.
playbook.implementationHint: Connect label and control via htmlFor/id or aria-labelledby.

priorityQueue.message: Clickable non-interactive element lacks keyboard interaction support.
priorityQueue.suggestedFix: Use a semantic button/link, or add role="button", tabIndex="0", and key handlers.
